'''japama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:headbutter|headbutter]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-p-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:headbutter|headbutter]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| japama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæpæmæth|jæpæmæth]] || [[word:jæpæmæj|jæpæmæj]] || [[word:jæpæmæsh|jæpæmæsh]] || [[word:jæpæmæ|jæpæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:japapamath|japapamath]] || [[word:japapamaj|japapamaj]] || [[word:japapamash|japapamash]] || [[word:japapama|japapama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:japamath|japamath]] || [[word:japamaj|japamaj]] || [[word:japamash|japamash]] || [[word:japama|japama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:japafmath|japafmath]] || [[word:japafmaj|japafmaj]] || [[word:japafmash|japafmash]] || [[word:japafmaf|japafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:japamatha|japamatha]] || [[word:japamaja|japamaja]] || [[word:japamasha|japamasha]] || [[word:japamaka|japamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:japamath|japamath]] || [[word:japamaj|japamaj]] || [[word:japamash|japamash]] || [[word:japama|japama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:japamathal|japamathal]] || [[word:japamajal|japamajal]] || [[word:japamashal|japamashal]] || [[word:japamakal|japamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:japamathatha|japamathatha]] || [[word:japamajaja|japamajaja]] || [[word:japamashasha|japamashasha]] || [[word:japamaka|japamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:japamathan|japamathan]] || [[word:japamajan|japamajan]] || [[word:japamashan|japamashan]] || [[word:japamakan|japamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:japamathaoro|japamathaoro]] || [[word:japamajaoro|japamajaoro]] || [[word:japamashaoro|japamashaoro]] || [[word:japamakaoro|japamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
